author: chfast
content: I don't think this is impossible, but at least some people think it is too late to do so in Glamsterdam. I read this as it would be too big risk for already complicated hard fork.

author: draganrakita
content:
Would be good to hear from people that think it is too late for it. 

EIP-8037 have removed Selfdestruct state refund (as it is complex to do correctly), and EIP-7708 would remove burn logs if selfdestruct gets deprecated, so removal is kinda simplifying code even more.
